tiktok.caption: You got raises. You spent them. 75% of people upgrade their lifestyle within 90 days — and that habit costs $1.4M at retirement.

youtube_short.title: Lifestyle Creep Is Stealing $1.4M From You
title_alternatives: Why Getting Raises Makes You Broke
The $1.4M Habit Nobody Warns You About
youtube_short.description: Every raise you've ever gotten — you spent it. That's lifestyle creep, and 75% of people upgrade their spending within 90 days of every pay increase. The sneaky part? It hits $200K earners just as hard as $60K earners. If you'd invested just the raise delta from age 30 to 65 instead, you'd retire with $1.4 million extra. The fix is simple: every time you get a raise, redirect one upgrade — just one — to an index fund automatically. That single habit, repeated with every raise, is how you actually build wealth. #personalfinance #moneytips #investing — Follow for the money traps nobody warns you about.

hook_line: You got the raises. Where did the money go?
